title: MIddleware Administrator - Contract
description:
About this opportunity :
We are seeking a skilled and proactive Middleware Administrator to join one of our government entities' IT infrastructure team. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing, upgrading, and maintaining the JBoss Enterprise Application Platform (EAP) environments. This role is critical in ensuring the reliability, scalability, and performance of our middleware systems.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Upgrade JBoss EAP: Plan, execute, and validate the upgrade of JBoss EAP from version 7.2 to 7.4 across all relevant environments, ensuring minimal downtime and robust rollback strategies.
  • Setup JBoss EAP 8.1.x: Install, configure, and optimise JBoss EAP 8.1.x for new and existing applications, including cluster setup, security hardening, and integration with other enterprise systems.
  • Troubleshoot JBoss EAP Issues: Diagnose and resolve incidents and performance issues related to JBoss EAP, collaborating with development and operations teams to ensure system stability and availability.

Requirements :

  • ·Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent experience.
  • Proven experience administering JBoss EAP environments, including upgrades and new installations.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills for middleware and application server environments.
  • Familiarity with Windows server operating systems and scripting (PowerShell, batch file, etc.).
  • Experience with security configurations, clustering, and performance tuning in JBoss EAP.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.


Preferred To Have :

  • Experience with JBoss EAP 7.x and 8.x in production environments.
  • Knowledge of DevOps tools and automation for middleware management.
  • Background in application deployment and CI/CD pipelines.

postedCompany.description: Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.
postedCompany.name: ZENITH INFOTECH (S) PTE LTD.
